## 9. Success Criteria
The project is successful when:
- [ ] All P0 requirements pass UAT
- [ ] Product deployed to production
- [ ] User signs off on Closure document
- [ ] [Project-specific business metric, if any]

## 10. Authorization

By signing this charter, the Product Owner authorizes the team to proceed to Phase 2 (Requirements).
